statement: In every magma, Equation 2760 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * y)) * w`) implies Equation 1770 (`x = (y * z) * ((x * w) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0779
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z y)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op x w) w))
